hero.title: The Maritime Industry's
hero.subtitle: End the spreadsheet chaos and email threads. Let shipowners filter certified crew in seconds; let seafarers reach global opportunities with verified profiles.

features.sectionSubtitle: The only platform that truly understands GRT, kW, visa, and certification constraints.

filter.title: Advanced Filtering
filter.description: Find the right crew by GRT limit, kW capacity, STCW certificates, visa status and years of experience — in seconds.

verified.title: Verified Profiles
verified.description: Every seafarer's document is verified, every profile is certified. No more fake CVs or outdated certificates.

global.title: Global Job Listings
global.description: From cargo vessels to luxury yachts, tankers to Ro-Ro ships — worldwide opportunities in one place.

footer.tagline: The trusted HR platform for the maritime industry.
